info.title: Surfpool RPC + cheatcodes (drafted from docs/source)
info.description:
Gecko's comprehension surface for Surfpool (https://surfpool.run), the drop-in solana-test-validator replacement by Txtx (Apache-2.0). Surfpool speaks Solana JSON-RPC on http://localhost:8899 and adds a `surfnet_*` cheatcode family for deterministic state manipulation.

NO OpenAPI ships for Surfpool: this spec is the docs->draft-OpenAPI on-ramp. Method names and parameters were sourced from the cheatcodes RPC trait in solana-foundation/surfpool (crates/core/src/rpc/surfnet_cheatcodes.rs) and the typed params in crates/types/src/types.rs + crates/core/src/types.rs, cross-checked against https://docs.surfpool.run/rpc/cheatcodes.

HONESTY / JSON-RPC<->OpenAPI MISMATCH: Surfpool is JSON-RPC, not REST. Every call is really a POST to ONE endpoint (`/`) whose body is the envelope {jsonrpc:"2.0", id, method, params}. OpenAPI requires a unique (path, method) per operation, so each RPC method is surfaced here as its OWN question-shaped operation: operationId = the exact JSON-RPC method, path = a virtual `/{method}` route, requestBody = that method's params by name. The true wire endpoint and method are carried in `x-jsonrpc-endpoint` / `x-jsonrpc-method` on each operation. A LIVE caller wraps the requestBody under `params` in the envelope and POSTs to `x-jsonrpc-endpoint`; this recorded/comprehension demo surfaces each method directly so an agent can find and shape the call correctly first try. Local validator = no auth.

x-jsonrpc.note: Virtual `/{method}` paths exist only so OpenAPI can give each JSON-RPC method its own operation. Live transport collapses them all to POST `/` with the method in the envelope.

servers.description: Default Surfpool RPC (local validator). No auth.

post.summary: Set an account's lamports balance, data, and owner directly (cheatcode).
post.description: Cheatcode: overwrite an account's fields in the local validator without a real transaction. JSON-RPC method `surfnet_setAccount`, params [pubkey, update].

pubkey.description: Base-58 public key of the account to set.

post.summary: Set or overwrite an SPL token account's amount, delegate, and state (cheatcode).
post.description: Cheatcode: create/patch a token account for (owner, mint). JSON-RPC method `surfnet_setTokenAccount`, params [owner, mint, update, tokenProgram?].

owner.description: Base-58 public key of the token account owner.

mint.description: Base-58 public key of the token mint.

tokenProgram.description: Optional base-58 token program address (defaults to the SPL Token program).

post.summary: Override the values returned by getSupply (total, circulating) on the local validator (cheatcode).
post.description: Cheatcode: configure what `getSupply` reports. JSON-RPC method `surfnet_setSupply`, params [update].

post.summary: Jump the local validator clock to an absolute slot, epoch, or timestamp (cheatcode).
post.description: Cheatcode: move time forward to test epoch/slot-dependent logic. JSON-RPC method `surfnet_timeTravel`, params [config?]. With no config it advances ~1 hour.

200.description: New epoch/slot state after the jump.

post.summary: Freeze the local validator clock so time stops advancing (cheatcode).
post.description: Cheatcode: halt clock progression until resumed. JSON-RPC method `surfnet_pauseClock`, no params.

200.description: Clock state at the moment of pause.

post.summary: Resume the local validator clock after a pause (cheatcode).
post.description: Cheatcode: restart clock progression. JSON-RPC method `surfnet_resumeClock`, no params.

post.summary: Clone a deployed program account from one program id to another (cheatcode).
post.description: Cheatcode: copy a program's account state to a new address. JSON-RPC method `surfnet_cloneProgramAccount`, params [sourceProgramId, destinationProgramId].

sourceProgramId.description: Base-58 public key of the program to clone from.

destinationProgramId.description: Base-58 public key of the program to clone into.

post.summary: Patch the upgrade authority of a program's ProgramData account (cheatcode).
post.description: Cheatcode: set or clear a program's upgrade authority. JSON-RPC method `surfnet_setProgramAuthority`, params [programId, newAuthority?]. Omitting newAuthority makes the program immutable.

programId.description: Base-58 public key of the program.

newAuthority.description: Optional base-58 public key of the new upgrade authority. Omit to remove the authority.

post.summary: Reset an account to its on-chain (forked mainnet) state, discarding local edits (cheatcode).
post.description: Cheatcode: undo local mutations to an account. JSON-RPC method `surfnet_resetAccount`, params [pubkey].

pubkey.description: Base-58 public key of the account to reset.

post.summary: Airdrop SOL lamports to a wallet from the local faucet (standard Solana RPC).
post.description: Standard Solana RPC: fund a wallet with lamports. JSON-RPC method `requestAirdrop`, params [pubkey, lamports, config?]. Returns the funding transaction signature.

pubkey.description: Base-58 public key of the wallet to fund.

lamports.description: Amount to airdrop, in lamports (1 SOL = 1_000_000_000 lamports).

schema.description: Base-58 transaction signature of the airdrop.

post.summary: Get the lamports balance of an account (standard Solana RPC read).
post.description: Standard Solana RPC: read an account's lamports. JSON-RPC method `getBalance`, params [pubkey, config?].

pubkey.description: Base-58 public key of the account to query.

200.description: Balance in lamports, wrapped in the RPC context envelope.

post.summary: Get the slot the local validator has reached (standard Solana RPC read).
post.description: Standard Solana RPC: current slot height. JSON-RPC method `getSlot`, params [config?].

post.summary: Get full account info (lamports, owner, data) for a public key (standard Solana RPC read).
post.description: Standard Solana RPC: read an account record. JSON-RPC method `getAccountInfo`, params [pubkey, config?].

pubkey.description: Base-58 public key of the account to query.

200.description: Account info wrapped in the RPC context envelope.

post.summary: Get total and circulating SOL supply (standard Solana RPC read).
post.description: Standard Solana RPC: read supply. JSON-RPC method `getSupply`, params [config?]. Pairs with the surfnet_setSupply cheatcode.

200.description: Supply wrapped in the RPC context envelope.

AccountUpdate.description: Fields to set on an account. All optional; only provided fields are changed. (Rust AccountUpdate; serde camelCase.)

owner.description: Base-58 public key of the owning program.

executable.description: Whether the account holds a loaded program (read-only).

rentEpoch.description: Epoch at which the account next owes rent.

TokenAccountUpdate.description: Fields to set on an SPL token account. All optional. (Rust TokenAccountUpdate; serde camelCase.)

amount.description: Token amount held in the account.

delegate.description: Base-58 public key of the delegate.

closeAuthority.description: Base-58 public key of the close authority.

SupplyUpdate.description: Values getSupply should report. All optional. (Rust SupplyUpdate; serde camelCase.)

nonCirculatingAccounts.description: Base-58 public keys counted as non-circulating.

TimeTravelConfig.description: How to move the clock. Exactly one variant. (Rust TimeTravelConfig untagged enum; serde camelCase.)

absoluteTimestamp.description: Jump to this absolute UNIX-ms timestamp.

RpcResponseEmpty.description: Standard RpcResponse<()> — a context plus a null value, returned by state-mutating cheatcodes.

EpochInfo.description: Clock/epoch snapshot returned by time cheatcodes.
